book_description: Extract skills, methodologies, and ways of thinking from uploaded documents to create reusable skills. PDF, TXT, DOCX, and Markdown files are supported.
web_description:
Extract skills, methodologies, and ways of thinking from the supplied web pages to create reusable skills.
Use this when a user provides website links.
msg_task_cannot_stop: The current task cannot be stopped.
msg_task_cannot_install: The current task cannot be installed.
msg_task_cannot_download: The current task cannot be downloaded.
placeholder_web_urls: Enter one web page URL per line
upload_title: Click or drag files here to upload
upload_limit_hint: Upload up to 20 documents at a time; each file must not exceed 100 MB.
upload_type_hint: Supported file types: TXT, DOCX, Markdown (.md), PDF
msg_unsupported_book_format: Only TXT, DOCX, MD, and PDF files are supported.
msg_file_too_large: Each file must not exceed 100 MB.
msg_max_file_count: You can upload up to 20 documents at a time.
msg_skill_name_too_long: The skill name can contain up to 20 characters.
msg_invalid_doc_max_token: Maximum tokens must be a positive integer.
msg_invalid_web_url: Enter a valid HTTP or HTTPS web page URL.
msg_invalid_max_token: Maximum tokens must be an integer between 1 and 102400.
